subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy felicitations for the Festival reached me and brought joy and delight to my spirit. With profound gratitude I received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست قدیم تبریک عید رسید و سبب روح و ریحان گردید نهایت ممنونیت حاصل شد که
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @poems and quotation from poetry, @stories; anecdotes
